notableEvents.label: Jacob Wilson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Wilson grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Brent Rooker out at 2nd. Jacob Wilson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil steals (1) 3rd base. Max Muncy steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Shea Langeliers grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Shea Langeliers hits a grand slam (3) to center field. Max Muncy scores. Denzel Clarke scores. Nick Kurtz scores.

notableEvents.label: Andy Ibáñez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andy Ibáñez grounds out, third baseman Kazuma Okamoto to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Nick Kurtz to 3rd. Shea Langeliers out at 2nd. Tyler Soderstrom out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Ernie Clement singles on a line drive to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom. Nathan Lukes scores. Daulton Varsho to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ernie Clement GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ernie Clement grounds into a double play, shortstop Jacob Wilson to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Daulton Varsho out at 2nd. Ernie Clement out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Addison Barger grounds into a force out, second baseman Andy Ibáñez to shortstop Jacob Wilson. Jesús Sánchez to 3rd. Andrés Giménez out at 2nd. Addison Barger to 1st.
